summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AUTO-SYSTEM implementation. All backend APIs working perfectly with 15/15 tests passed. Frontend Control Center AUTO mode toggle, Run Engines button, and Auto Mode Active banner all functioning correctly. Complete AUTO-SYSTEM workflow tested successfully.
passed_tests: Demo admin login via /api/auth/demo works correctly
GET /api/admin/system-settings returns settings with assignment_mode (manual/auto)
POST /api/admin/system-settings?assignment_mode=auto successfully toggles to auto mode
POST /api/admin/system-settings?assignment_mode=manual successfully toggles to manual mode
POST /api/system/run-all executes all three engines (priority, alert, assignment) in sequence
POST /api/system/auto-assignment/run runs assignment engine based on current mode
POST /api/system/alert-engine/run generates system alerts (0 created in clean system)
POST /api/system/priority-engine/run adjusts priorities (0 updated in clean system)
GET /api/admin/system-alerts returns active alerts list (empty in clean system)
Complete AUTO-SYSTEM workflow: manual->auto->run engines->check alerts->back to manual
Control Center page loads with data-testid='admin-control-center'
AUTO toggle in header with data-testid='auto-mode-toggle' works correctly
Auto Mode Active banner appears when assignment_mode=auto with correct text
Auto Mode Active banner disappears when assignment_mode=manual
Run Engines button with data-testid='run-engines-btn' triggers all engines
System Snapshot section displays all 6 metrics correctly
Live Pipeline section shows all 6 columns (Backlog, Assigned, In Progress, Review, Validation, Done)
Team Health section displays developer information
Project Health section shows project status
Action Queue section displays pending actions count
Refresh button functionality works correctly
Toggle AUTO MODE works - switches between manual and auto with visual feedback
